entry.title: Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
Re: How to reset cleared items in closed posting periods?
entry.content: Hi, in regards to point 5 - how do I "ensure that no postings are made; only the allocation is updated"? My system automatically posts when using FBRA. FBD1 is for setting up a recurring document so not sure how that is relevant here?

entry.title: Re: How to configure Sharepoint as Content Repository for SAP (ArchiveLink)
entry.content:
Archivelink is SAP propietary integration, it will not survive a cloud Open source Technology/Application move

Think about using CMIS or BTP DMS

entry.title: Re: PurRqs will be generated when Available Qty -1000 always
entry.content: Here are MRP1 and MRP2 tap.

entry.title: Re: Hide dynamically measures
entry.content: I'm not sure why blank measures are coming back after creating a new version, it should keep original state after version operation.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am interested in participating in the digital skills initiative as a disabled veteran looking to make a mid-life career change into SAP ABAP programming.

I currently work in oil and gas measurement and automation and as my service-connected disabilities worsen, I am forced to look for opportunities to work in a less physically demanding occupation.

I am excited at the opportunity to expand my programming capabilities as I develop into a new career.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, 

I am Vietnamese guys want to switch my career midlife. I am working as an SAP end user but want to embrace and rotate to SAP consultant field. 

I really interested in participating in the digital skills initiative, and really appreciate if I can engage to this opportunity!

Thank you for considering my application

HoangZHJ

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set-up promotion to give only disco...
entry.content:
Hi Sassa,

Thank you for your reply. However, this promotion is fired on every order of the customer where the product is present. 

What we wanted is also limit it to 3 items only per customer. So succeeding order of the customer of the item will not fire the promotion. 

Can this be configured?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP TechEd 2024: Top Reasons to Attend the Data & Analytics Track
entry.content:
SAP TechEd 2024 returns in a fresh new fully virtual format followed by an in-person TechEd on tour! From October 8-9, hear from SAP experts, customers, and partners as they deep-dive into topics such as application development, artificial intelligence, data and analytics, cloud ERP, and more.

Interested in learning more about Data and Analytics at TechEd 2024 but don’t know where to begin? Start here:

  1. Register now for free
  2. Attend the Data and Analytics overview session
  3. Check out the sessions below and build your schedule
  4. Continue exploring Data & Analytics solutions through free trials

Data and Analytics

The Data and Analytics track will feature lectures and hands-on jumpstart sessions on key innovations for SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Datasphere, SAP Analytics Cloud, and SAP Master Data Governance. For an overview, register for the session below.

DA100 | Data in the age of AI
Generative AI is the next revolution in productivity, but it will heavily rely on the context and quality of the data fueling it. Learn about the latest innovations in SAP data and analytics solutions and how customers are transforming their enterprise landscapes to be AI ready with a business data fabric.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 10:30 AM - 11:15 AM CET / 4:30 AM - 5:15 AM EST | Learn more

Keep scrolling to explore the top sessions to attend for each Data and Analytics sub-track!

SAP HANA Cloud

DA101 | SAP HANA Cloud: Recent innovations, road map, and strategy
Stay up to date with the latest features of SAP HANA Cloud and planned functionalities over the next 12 months. Key topics covered include the new vector capabilities of SAP HANA Cloud, which infuse generative AI into your applications.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 11:30 AM - 11:55 AM CET / 5:30 AM - 5:55 AM EST | Learn more

DA102 | AI-enabled clean core with SAP HANA Cloud
AI-enabled data applications built on SAP HANA Cloud help preserve the hygiene of mission-critical SAP solutions such as SAP S/4HANA while simultaneously driving innovation. Learn about strategies to maintain the upgradability and agility of your core applications while infusing innovation and hyperpersonalization into your unique business processes.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 3:30 PM - 3:55 PM CET / 9:30 AM - 9:55 AM EST | Learn more

DA103 | Generative AI–driven business transformation enabled by SAP HANA Cloud 
Hear about SAP HANA Cloud and how it supports AI initiatives. See how it provides a robust and scalable data management platform that smoothly integrates and optimizes AI applications. Learn how SAP HANA Cloud accelerates AI projects through fast data processing, real-time analytics, and advanced algorithms. Discover through practical use cases how companies from various industries have successfully implemented AI.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 6:30 PM - 6:55 PM CET / 12:30 PM - 12:55 PM EST | Learn more

DA181 | Build AI-enabled intelligent data applications to help keep the core clean
AI-enabled intelligent data applications built on SAP HANA Cloud with its vector engine and knowledge graph help preserve the hygiene of your mission-critical SAP software, such as SAP S/4HANA, while driving innovation. Learn how to build intelligent data applications using the development framework of SAP Business Technology Platform, including SAP Business Application Studio and SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, in combination with the native development capabilities of SAP HANA Cloud.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 7:30 PM - 7:55 PM CET / 1:30 PM - 1:55 PM EST | Learn more

SAP Datasphere

DA107 | SAP Datasphere: Recent innovations, road map, and strategy
Hear directly from the product team for the SAP Datasphere solution about the latest enhancements. Learn more about the solution’s strategic direction and features planned for the next 12 months.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 12:30 PM - 12:55 PM CET / 6:30 AM - 6:55 AM EST | Learn more

DA201 | Zalando Payments' journey to unlock the value of information assets
 Discover how Zalando Payments revolutionized its data insights using the SAP Datasphere solution. See how the company overcame challenges in understanding its information assets and used SAP Datasphere to provide answers to common questions like "What is the calculation logic?"; "How fresh is the data?"; and "Who is the owner?". Learn how Zalando enjoys a centralized hub for metric details, business terms, and data assets, giving stakeholders smooth access to comprehensive documentation.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 3:00 PM - 3:25 PM CET / 9:00 AM - 9:25 AM EST | Learn more

DA200 | Best features of SAP BW in SAP Datasphere
Learn more about the features you know from the SAP Business Warehouse (SAP BW) application that have made their way natively into the SAP Datasphere solution. Get an overview of the modernization options and discover how you can start small by reusing models to complete your move to the cloud.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 4:00 PM - 4:25 PM CET / 10:00 AM - 10:25 AM EST | Learn more

DA110 | How to treat data as a product
Learn how the SAP Datasphere solution helps you discover, share, and access data from various data providers in a simple and intuitive way.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 7:00 PM - 7:25 PM CET / 1:00 PM - 1:25 PM EST | Learn more

SAP Analytics Cloud

DA105 | SAP Analytics Cloud: Recent innovations, road map, and strategy
 Stay up to date with the latest features of the SAP Analytics Cloud solution and planned functionalities over the next 12 months. Key topics covered include strategic investment areas, the latest update on new stack (new model and optimized story), new planning and simulation features, and platform and connectivity improvements.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 12:00 PM - 12:25 PM CET / 6:00 AM - 6:25 AM EST | Learn more

DA109 | SAP Analytics Cloud: Deep-dive into new features
Learn about new features in the SAP Analytics Cloud solution. These include newly released features such as seamless planning, story presentation mode, and SAP Analytics Cloud Compass, which guides nontechnical users through Monte Carlo simulation to model business scenarios with SAP and third-party data.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 8:00 PM - 8:25 PM CET / 2:00 PM - 2:25 PM EST | Learn more

SAP Datasphere + SAP Analytics Cloud

DA180 | Explore SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud end to end
 In a jump-start workshop, build a scenario with exercises for the SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud solutions. Find out how SAP Datasphere helps the line-of-business user get the job done. Create an extendable semantic business model in an agile way, and connect analytics and visualization components in the context of a business data fabric.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 2:30 PM - 2:55 PM CET / 8:30 AM - 8:55 AM EST | Learn more

DA106 | Integration of SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere solutions
Hear about one of the most important and strategic areas for analytics and planning in SAP Analytics Cloud. Learn about current integration capabilities and our vision for future data and analytics architecture.
Wednesday, Oct 9, 6:00 PM - 6:25 PM CET / 12:00 PM - 12:25 PM EST | Learn more

SAP Master Data Governance

DA104 | Newest innovations in SAP Master Data Governance
Learn about deployment options for the SAP Master Data Governance application both in the cloud and on premise. See how the application can be a key enabler of your business transformation and how automation and federation enable your digitalization and AI strategy and your path to the cloud. Explore how the newest innovations around federation, cloud-ready mode, and increased automation can let you build a comprehensive, scalable master data solution for your organization.
Tuesday, Oct 8, 1:00 PM - 1:25 PM CET / 7:00 AM - 7:25 AM EST | Learn more

Learn how SAP can help bring out your best. Join us at SAP TechEd 2024 and be the first to hear about the latest technology and innovations being delivered by SAP.  Don’t miss out - secure your spot today.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content:
{
  "d" : {
    "__metadata" : {
      "id" : "http://hostname.local:8004/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet('50000004')",
      "uri" : "http://hostname.local:8004/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet('50000004')",
      "type" : "Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV.SalesOrder"
    },
    "DocType" : "TA",
    "SalesOrg" : "8900",
    "DistrChan" : "10",
    "Division" : "11",
    "TextLine" : "coba text",
    "ItmNumber" : "000010",
    "ReqQty" : "15.000",
    "PartnRole" : "AG",
    "PartnNumb" : "0001000000",
    "Material" : "000000000030000032",
    "Plant" : "8921",
    "TargetQty" : "15.000",
    "CondType" : "",
    "CondValue" : "0.000000000"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST in SAP Gateway Client
entry.content: Thanks I have posted the screnshot and the HTTP request body

entry.title: pack outbound deliveries work center field
entry.content:
Hi

On the Pack Outbound Deliveries app, you choose the Warehouse, Work Center and Storage Bin to create the pack.

How do we get the Work Center field or information through the API. I have checked the 

Outbound Delivery (A2X), Handling Unit, Packing Instruction and Packing Instruction – Read, Create (A2X) API's or even the Work Center that can be linked, I can't seem to find it whereas Warehouse and Storage Bin are available.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 SAP M table Row none editable
entry.content:
Hi, 

I want SAPUI5 SAP M table Row not editable at initialization of the table.

entry.title: Re: Change the value in header level based on item level...
entry.content: Hi, Please try with the BADI FIN_ACDOC_SUBSTITUTION, this should work for the substitution for the entire accounting document. You could check the BADI with transaction SE18. Following link is the Help Portal Documentation for your reference, https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/adbae5bcd5994f159bf2847a11397b61/6d95f6fa596646f59cfb9dd0dd7b7fd3.html Kind Regards, Lucy

entry.title: Re: UDF and FMS not working
entry.content:
Hi @SonTran ,

Query you gave got errors on my SQL Server. Can you have a query for Query Generator? Also, our SAP Business One version is 10.

entry.title: Import into node dev_node failed. - Error during client creation: Not Found
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a problem importing a file into Dev transport node in SAP BTP .

Getting the following error Import into node dev_node failed. - Error during client creation: Not Found.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Re: Error SG105 - Enter rate / INR rate type M
entry.content: how you fix？

entry.title: From MEMASSPO to Fiori: Enhancing Purchase Order Management with Mass Changes
entry.content:
Introduction:

In today’s fast-paced business environment, procurement departments face increasing pressure to process large volumes of purchase orders (POs) efficiently while maintaining accuracy. Traditional methods (T-code: MEMASSPO) of updating purchase orders one at a time can be non-user-friendly, cumbersome, time-consuming, and prone to error, especially when dealing with high-volume data.

To address these challenges, SAP Fiori offers the "Mass Changes to Purchase Orders" tile, a powerful tool designed to streamline procurement workflows by enabling users to modify multiple purchase orders simultaneously. This functionality increases efficiency and ensures that procurement teams can quickly adapt to changes in supplier contracts, pricing, and delivery schedules. In this blog, we will explore this Fiori tile's key features and benefits and provide insights into how it can simplify the process of making mass updates to purchase orders.

Background:

In the ECC world, users relied on transaction MEMASSPO to make mass changes to purchase orders. While MEMASSPO provided an essential function for modifying multiple POs simultaneously, it was often viewed as outdated. Its user interface could be challenging to navigate, especially for non-technical users. The traditional approach needed the intuitive design and flexibility that modern businesses demand, requiring users to spend considerable time navigating various fields and screens.

With the rise of SAP Fiori, the need for a more user-friendly and efficient tool became apparent. The "Mass Changes to Purchase Orders (ID: F2593)" tile was introduced as a part of SAP's efforts to modernize procurement processes. This new Fiori application enhances usability through its simplified, role-based interface while still providing the robust mass-change capabilities that users were familiar with from MEMASSPO. The Fiori app reduces errors, boosts productivity, and supports faster decision-making in procurement operations by offering a streamlined process for making large-scale changes.

How-To:

In this example, I am updating the delivery date on the purchase order line item, but the same applies to the header or item field.

Conclusion:

The "Mass Changes to Purchase Orders" Fiori tile represents a significant leap from traditional tools like MEMASSPO, providing a more intuitive, efficient, and user-friendly solution for procurement teams. With its modern interface, simplified navigation, and powerful mass-editing capabilities, the Fiori app empowers users to make large-scale changes to purchase orders quickly and accurately. This reduces the risk of errors and saves valuable time, allowing organizations to focus on strategic decision-making and improving overall procurement efficiency. As businesses evolve, leveraging tools like this Fiori app will be key to staying agile in dynamic supply chain environments.

 

  • If you find my blog useful, please like and share your feedback in the comments below and follow me for more content like the above.
  • Please follow my profile for future posts (Ravi Dave)
  • Topic Page (find the most relevant one –  https://community.sap.com/topics/)
  • Ask questions about MM (Materials Management) and follow ( https://answers.sap.com/tags/477297786799213261950044802925335)
  • Read other MM (Materials Management) blog posts and follow ( https://blogs.sap.com/tags/477297786799213261950044802925335/)

entry.title: No LDAP connection - Main thread ends due to RFC return code 6
entry.content:
I am assigned to do the LDAP connection as part of enhancement of synchronizing all SAP user's data from SAP_HR to Active directory. I have followed the instruction to this link: Configuring the LDAP Connector (sap.com)

However, upon checking to the dev_LDAP_RFC.trc to check the activation of the connector, I am getting this error log.

[Thu Sep 19 09:44:36 2024] (mainU, 5096)
*** ERROR ***
Main thread ends due to RFC return code 6
Message:
[Thu Sep 19 09:44:38 2024]
SAP LDAP Connector, (c) 1999-2024 SAP AG, Walldorf, Germany
=========================================================================================
Build (date) : 753 (May 5 2023)
Patch Number : 1200
Executable type : Optimized / Multi-Threaded
OS (platform) : NT (NTAMD64)
Startup time : Thu Sep 19 09:44:38 2024
Command line : G:\usr\sap\<SID>\DVEBMGS00\exe\ldap_rfc "-a" "ldap_rfc" "-x" "sapgw00" "-g" "sapqas01.mayniladsap.com" "-l" "0" "-f" "G:\usr\sap\<SID>\DVEBMGS00\work\dev_LDAP_RFC.trc"
LDAP Connector Options

Trace Level : 0 (command line)
Logfile : G:\usr\sap\<SID>\DVEBMGS00\work\dev_LDAP_RFC.trc (command line)
Connection outdate (min) : 60 (default)
Max. number of connections : 32 (default)
Page size (0 = no paging) : 0 (default)
Configuration file : ldap_rfc.cfg (default)
Connection Parameters passed to the SAP NetWeaver RFC SDK

GWHOST : <GWHOST>
GWSERV : sapgw00
PROGRAM_ID : ldap_rfc

LDAP_RFC connection test is successful and able to start the connector.

 

Can you please check the logs and provide more details about "Main thread ends due to RFC return code 6"?

entry.title: Re: No LDAP connection - Main thread ends due to RFC return code 6
entry.content: Just to add, functional team tried to test on their end and file generated contains "No LDAP connection".

entry.title: Re: Due date
entry.content: Can you please advise how to check if user has changed it manually or not.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 SAP M table Row none editable
entry.content:
Hi,

I want SAPUI5 SAP M table particular row to be set as not Editable for the User.

Your inputs will be appreciated and correct help will be rewarded.

entry.title: BYD2408 Confirmation Journal reverse exclusion
entry.content:
When a confirmations reversed, how to exclude it from confirmation journal(example using excel add-on).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2408 Confirmation Journal reverse exclusion
entry.content:
We are unable to exclude a reversed confirmation from confirmation journal.

The Confirmation Journal report shows detailed information on task confirmations which is only available in this report and also shows the changes to inventory as a result of confirmed warehouse and production tasks. For example, a reversed warehouse confirmation also contains inventory change information on a logistics area, hence, we cannot exclude it from confirmation journal.

For more information about Confirmation Journal report, you can refer to the following Help Portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/a0978302bca3402ca2db64cb7e035188.html?version=2202#overview

entry.title: Re: How can i keep the leading space in the ALV outputting data?
entry.content:
Hello,

the ALV grid trimms leading spaces in standard.

Only if method CL_SALV_COLUMN->SET_LEADING_SPACES is called passing abap_true 
for this column object values are displayed with leading spaces.

Best Regards,

Rose

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I’m Quyen Tran, a final-year student in Management Information Systems,in Vietnam. I’m deeply passionate about SAP and its potential to transform businesses, and I’m eager to start my career in this field. The digital skills initiative is the perfect opportunity for me to gain the knowledge and certification I need to make that dream a reality.

As a first-generation college student, I’ve faced challenges in accessing resources, but my commitment to learning SAP is unwavering. I truly believe that this certification will help me build a solid foundation and open doors to a successful future in the SAP ecosystem.

I’m excited about this opportunity and ready to give my best.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Quyen Tran

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi @AmelieFidric 

I attended the session on ILX Success: Rollout Strategies  last week. I asked about the UI for External Instructors. 

Currently in our Legacy learning experience, our External Instructors has access to My Classes only (no landing page). They do not have access to any catalogue.

In the new learning experience, External Instructors can also see Required Learning, Important Learning, Invest in Myself, etc. which are not relevant to them and they have no permission to. The sections are there but with message "Looks like the data isn't loading. Some content didn't load. Please try again later."  

SAP Incident was already raised. Reply - Product Management is confirming the current behavior as designed.

If we cant hide the sections for external instructors, can we at least get rid of the message? 

thanks.

Jenn

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: if you want to test "create", you have to remove ("***") from the url, entityset name is enough

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: if you want to test "update", change the method to patch/merge.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: I changed url to : /sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet?$format=json

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: I changed url to : /sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet?$format=json. And then I POST it with similar data in the previous screnshot. The result is Error Status Code 400 Bad Request

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST in SAP Gateway Client
entry.content: The Data Services Request contains SystemQueryOptions that are not allowed for this Request Type

entry.title: Re: Sailpoint Integration with SAP BTP
entry.content: Sailpoint has just released the btp out of the box connector. Go to create connectors and select Sap BTP.

entry.title: Re: Service contract and item numbering changes
entry.content: No, you could not change service contract and item numbering in SAP public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hey @David_Chaviano,

I applied for an SAP voucher two months ago, and you sent me the link to fill out the form. I filled out the form and also sent screenshots of the completed learning to the email address provided. I have still not received any response. 

Can you guide me on when I can expect the voucher for one attempt?
Thank you for your help, 

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I do really want to have this chance to kick-start my dream in tech career, I have been pursuing this field by self-studying and self-projected for 1 year and definitely acknowledging that my capability suits this career path. I'm moving on with the "Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA" course. I promise to fulfill this learning path to achieve my dream career.

I fall in the category of women.

Many thanks,

Linam Nguyen

entry.title: Import transport of 3rd party product into RISE / PCE
entry.content:
Hello,

what is the process of importing transport of 3rd party product into SAP RISE system?

do we need SAP approval?

Can we (system integrator or customer) add transports to the system ourselves or sap needs to do it?

our customer is stuck in a limbo and I can’t find clear answers anywhere.

Anyone with experience doing this please pitch in.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content:
remove this part in your payload for post call

"d" : {
    "__metadata" : {
      "id" : "http://hostname.local:8004/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet('50000004')",
      "uri" : "http://hostname.local:8004/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV/SalesOrderSet('50000004')",
      "type" : "Z_ODTSLSORDCRT_SRV.SalesOrder"
    },

entry.title: Beginner Learning Journey for BTP?
entry.content: Hi, I am new to BTP. Where should I start my Learning Journey and what are the related certifications?

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: { "d" : { "Salesdocumentin" : "50000004", "DocType" : "TA", "SalesOrg" : "8900", "DistrChan" : "10", "Division" : "11", "TextLine" : "coba text", "ItmNumber" : "000010", "ReqQty" : "15.000", "PartnRole" : "AG", "PartnNumb" : "0001000000", "Material" : "000000000030000032", "Plant" : "8921", "TargetQty" : "15.000", "CondType" : "", "CondValue" : "0.000000000" } } and { "Salesdocumentin" : "50000004", "DocType" : "TA", "SalesOrg" : "8900", "DistrChan" : "10", "Division" : "11", "TextLine" : "coba text", "ItmNumber" : "000010", "ReqQty" : "15.000", "PartnRole" : "AG", "PartnNumb" : "0001000000", "Material" : "000000000030000032", "Plant" : "8921", "TargetQty" : "15.000", "CondType" : "", "CondValue" : "0.000000000" } similar Error both 405 Method Not Allowed

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • I am a young lady aged 22 who holds a bachelors degree in MIS.

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. 

Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Best Regards,

Thao Vy

entry.title: sap bwhana
entry.content:
hello every body,

can any body help me about sap bwhana i want to training and certification.please guide me

entry.title: Re: UDF and FMS not working
entry.content:
It is for FMS

For the query generator, just replace

T0.ItemCode=$[IGE1.ItemCode]

by 

T0.ItemCode=[%0]

entry.title: Re: No Backend Services Found API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION
entry.content:
Hello Ger,

don't know if the issue is still valid, but API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION is an OData-V4 service and therefore needs to be activated via transcation "/n/IWFND/V4_ADMIN" instead of "/IWFND/maint_service".

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/publish-activate-an-odata-v4-service-group-in-sap/ba-p/13554191

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/0f18dddf28764f5b807ecd80549044cc/f188a5ae7723424cabafbf3c80ce0c17.html?locale=en-US&version=2022.000

Best regards
Markus

entry.title: Digital Skill Initiative
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I’m Sagar Gaikwad, a student from computer science ,in India. I’m deeply passionate about SAP and its potential to transform businesses, and I’m eager to start my career in this field. The digital skills initiative is the perfect opportunity for me to gain the knowledge and certification I need to make that dream a reality.

As a first-generation college student, I’ve faced challenges in accessing resources, but my commitment to learning SAP is unwavering. I truly believe that this certification will help me build a solid foundation and open doors to a successful future in the SAP ecosystem.

I’m excited about this opportunity and ready to give my best.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Quyen Tran

entry.title: DNS as service procurement with godaddy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of my customer has the current onprem environemnt DNS with Godaddy and customer is planning for they are moving their instances on RISE. in this scenario, what onboarding information is required if they are going with GCP/AWS in Target?

 

Rgds,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: Sales and Operations Planning in SAP S/4 HANA.
entry.content:
I cannot create product groups as all the materials are created with one material type Zxxx => no products with mat type PROD exist. In MMNR via F5 I see no interval assigned to PROD.

Does it mean that I cannot use/create product groups in MC84 / at all if the materials are not of the mat type PROD? 

I cannot create a material via mm01 with the the type PROD (it's not listed at all as a material type)

Is there any possibility to create products groups for customized material types Zxxx?

entry.title: Re: Using SAC Excel addin. Confusion on prices.
entry.content: Thank you this info much appriciated 🙂

entry.title: Re: Stop Production Order Release if PRT Missing
entry.content: Thanks Pruthvee. Let us check from your-end. In our manufacturing process PRT is a crucial thing.

entry.title: Re: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow...
entry.content:
Hi ISKhan

BI Content does not include DTP-s for this dataflow. These should be created manually.

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: Adding fields in standard report in public cloud (MB52)
entry.content: Hi Serhii, Thanks for the update. But in our scenario, we are not creating custom fields, we have to fetch some fields available in Batch information cockpit. Can you suggest how to proceed. And can you please suggest available badi for this report.

entry.title: How to update the train station field for vendor using BAPI for mass update.
entry.content: In the 'BP' T-Code, there is a field BAHNS (Train Station) in the Vendor: General Data tab. I couldn't find any BAPI for this BAHNS field. If a BAPI exists, please suggest one. If no BAPI is available, please help me by providing steps to extend the BAPI for the standard BAHNS field, as I couldn't find any steps for extending a standard field in a BAPI.

entry.title: Re: sap bwhana
entry.content:
Hi

Have you tried learning.sap.com?

https://learning.sap.com/search?access=free&page=1&query=bw%2F4hana

br

Roland

entry.title: RAP - Create mandatory fields Popup - Order of input fields
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm on S/4HANA On premise ABAP 2022. I have created RAP Application with three mandatory fields during create. However, I'm not able to control the order of fields as they appear. I changed the label of fields in the annotation.xml file in BAS but not sure how to change the order of fields. I want to move the first field to the bottom.

Please suggest.

Thanks,

Abhishek

entry.title: Re: Import into node dev_node failed. - Error during client creation: Not Found
entry.content: Is this issue in SAP Cloud Transport Management Service?

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - EWM How to start an ABAP report e. g. /SCWM/R_INITIALSTOCKUPLOAD
entry.content: As Public Cloud does only interacting via UI5 / Fiori APPS, I am as a consultant looking for a way to start a "standard" report in case there is no Fiori APP existing (e. g. for EWM transaction /SCWM/ISU). As an example for an report I would like to execute /SCWM/R_INITIALSTOCKUPLOAD.

entry.title: Re: Alternative labeling for function location & replacin...
entry.content:
I would encourage you to test the important processes of your business with respect to an alternative label being defined.
I have observed that when an alternative label is defined, historical data, such as completed notification in the past, will also reflect the updated label. This may impact the way you run historical reports.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Best Practices Content
entry.content:
Good day Tehreem Siraj,

Welcome to the SAP Signavio Customer Community.  Thank you for sharing your inquiry.  To obtain further assistance, we recommend that you please create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password). 

You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component: (Example)
 
System: 
Search for SAP Signavio  
 
Product Area: 
SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager 
 
Component: 
BPI (Business Process Intelligence) 
---  
BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or 
BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Select Product & Topic 
You can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center.   
There is a video that can guide you with how to create a case.
 
Kind regards,
Kantrice D.

entry.title: Re: Set Default Home Page in SAC
entry.content:
Hi PS_1978, 

    This default page seems is created via 'customized link' of application or story. So what you need to do is to create a customize link of your new target story (via story share) with same link. Of course, you need to first remove the same customize link of your original application. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Filter Data Action...
entry.content:
Hi guenay, 

   If your requirement is to pass dimension property as parameter to data action, what you described basically is right. But you can directly set dimension member parameter to data action via API and trigger it. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Cant Delete Member ID from Account Dimension in SAP A...
entry.content:
hi zaidank, 

   If you just want to delete the ID of row 1448, have you tried just mark this link and press the delete button in the toolbar? 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow...
entry.content:
Hi Roland

Thanks for the reply. You are correct that DTPs are not included in the BI content, but they also do not show up in the DataFlow after I created them manually. 

A strange thing I observed was that when double-clicking the right corner of the ADSO where DTP is shown the respective DTP is opened.

Do you have any solution to rectify this problem?

ISKhan

entry.title: Re: SMQ2 - Display LUW doesn't open the Display Logs
entry.content: Hi Maria, Is this any authorization missing in QAS, have you check the both systems having same authority?

entry.title: Re: Purpose Codes in Payment Media in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Michal, 

thank you very much for your information. 
We are updated our system to S4 HANA 2023 FPS01. 

I defined payment reasons and maintained combinations of payment reasons. 

I use payment medium format DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9 (with application Area ISO)

Payment method was updated and entered in master data of business partner. 

Also payment reason was entered in business partner master data (in general data).

I posted an vendor invoide with payment reason and did a payment run. 
But in the payment medium the values of payment reasons are not entered. 

Is it realy necessary to change the payment medium format? So I have do copy the DE_CGI_XML_CT_V9 and create a 'customer-payment-medium-format'?

Best regards Steffi

entry.title: HOW to securing odata services or api in sap btp CAPM in node js
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a client project with my team using the SAP BTP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) in Node.js, with CDS for our backend services. We have successfully created OData services and APIs, but we’re facing challenges in securing them effectively.

In other technology stacks like .NET and MERN, the standard approach we follow for securing APIs typically involves:

  1. Verifying the user based on their login credentials against the data stored in the database.
  2. Generating a token upon successful validation.
  3. Using authentication middleware to secure the APIs.

However, we are unsure how to apply this approach in the context of SAP BTP CAP. The usual methods of user authentication, token generation, and middleware usage seem different or not directly applicable.

Could you please guide us on the best practices for securing OData services or APIs in CAP? Any recommendations, frameworks, or configurations specific to SAP BTP CAP would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to send a notification managers when the performa...
entry.content:
@Arunima  Have you checked standard email notification "Step exit" ?

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Sort code for UK in SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello 

I have a question about the sort code used in UK. We have done the UK localization for ByDesign and was wondering if there is a dedicated field for this one in BYD? At least I couldn't find this term under "My Banks"

If not where would you suggest to add the extension field? Any knowledge on where and how it is used in the financial and supply chain processes?

So far, only thing we know is that we need it to be added to the customer invoice footer.

entry.title: Re: need SAC Free trail access but not Guided Experience
entry.content:
Hi Team, Can someone please help me on this. I want to explore on business content dashboard, but in GE i don't see the Business Content visible. Can someone please help me on this.

cc :  @nikhilanand650

entry.title: Re: Alternative Locations for the "Create Form" Button in...
entry.content:
@Arunima  Only way is either "Launch Form " transaction or  from Home drop via "Create Form"

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: Export of payslips to a vault like Google Drive or another
entry.content:
Generally speaking the output of a smartform (OTF Format) is always convertible to a PDF.

1) provided you have the payslip data in the needed form (as import parameters) to call the payslip smartform, then use:
CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_OTF'
EXPORTING
   format = 'PDF'
IMPORTING
  bin_filesize = lv_bin_fsize
  bin_file = lv_xstring_document  "Type xstring: your pdf...
TABLES
    otf = pt_otf   "Output of calling smartform function module, ls_job_output_info-otfdata  type TSFOTF
EXCEPTIONS
....

You can then save the xstring as a *.pdf on any drive you like...locally on your PC or on the ABAP server. I suggest to use PI/PO (Cloud Integration) to send the file to an external location.

2) if you have only a PERNR and i.e. a month and want to create the payslip:

    SELECT * FROM hrpy_rgdir INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_hrpy_rgdir
             WHERE pernr = iv_pernr  AND
                   seqnr = iv_seqnr.  "be carefull....this is not a month....check the table hrpy_rgdir

 IF lines( lt_hrpy_rgdir ) = 1.
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_hrpy_rgdir[ 1 ]  TO ls_rgdir.
ELSE.
    "ERROR
ENDIF.

DATA: lr_hrxss_rem_helper TYPE REF TO cl_hrxss_rem_helper.

    CREATE OBJECT lr_hrxss_rem_helper
      EXPORTING
        iv_pernr = iv_pernr.

    CALL METHOD lr_hrxss_rem_helper->get_payslip
      EXPORTING
        is_rgdir                   = ls_rgdir
        iv_form_name               = zhrbccl_constants=>mc_hrforms-valid_payslip  "Form Name
      IMPORTING
        ev_document                = ev_document_pdf
        ev_doc_size                = ev_document_size
      EXCEPTIONS
        ex_payslip_creation_failed = 1
        OTHERS                     = 2.

This method behaves depending on your PY Customizing......

Kind regards
Paul

entry.title: Re: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow...
entry.content: As DTP-s are not part of the Dataflow Object, they will not show up automatically. If you want them to be displayed, you can use the "Expand Dataflow" buttons. However just the fact, that the DTP-s are not included in the Dataflow has no functional impact on the loads.

entry.title: Re: solman_setup - Database hosts when connecting a managed system
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: A Beginner's demo for pushing data from SAP CPI to SOLACE
entry.content: @rohini_potham3 Thank you for this well-explained and detailed demo! I followed the steps and successfully pushed data from SAP CPI to SOLACE. It was a smooth and informative experience, and your guidance made it easy to understand. Looking forward to more insightful posts from you!

entry.title: Followup & feedback survey - APM,Report shows complete incomplete.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Appreciate your efforts/helps/guidance in advance.

1)For follow-up survey, we can configure "Days to complete". However, what if learners did not respond after that apparently survey will disappear automatically? We dont really want to set "survey required for completion" because it will literally mean 6months worth of learners are always incomplete.  And even admin/instructor marks the history manually so not sure how we can identify. Is there anyway to "push" surveys to those who did not complete after "Days to complete" has lapses?

2)Is there any chance we have threshold/interval/reoccurring for survey APM. We are required to have 100% response rate for follow-up Survey. As we are using specifically for managers only.

3)Is there any report do we use if we want to monitor who did not complete the follow-up survey as well as feedback survey, so that we can remind them through other means. As in data dictionary we have PA_STUD_SURVEY which give all the data but how we can add those columns in standard survey report. As post adding it still gives completed count.It's not showiing the surveys which are in "Not Started" status.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Soldoc issue with search by file content
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days.

entry.title: Re: Oracle 19c Database to S4 Table data migration using SAP DATA SERVICES
entry.content: SAP tables can ONLY be used as source, not target in DS. This is by-design. If you want to load into S4HANA system, you may need to design some WS function in S4HANA system. This WS function logic can load data into ERP tables. Then call this WS function in DS job. This can be a workaround for you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi all, my name is Borka,

I would like to participate in digital skills initiative in the category: People looking to switch their careers mid-life and People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

Most of my life I was a full stack developer and wanted to change my career.

I have completed learning journey for Certification : SAP Certified Specialist - Project Manager - SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Management

Could you please provide a certification attempt?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am a SAP functional consultant from Vietnam. I am a women and have 1 15-months baby. 

I've been working as SAP FI functional consultant for over 3 years. I want to upskill myselft so now i'm eager to learn and get certification in SAP public cloud.

I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt. I am looking forward to hear from you soon!

Thanks and Best regards,

Lam, Vu Tung

entry.title: Re: Unable to perform POST from SAP Build Apps.
entry.content: CAP dropped support for that @odata.type for some reason. To use the old adapter add odata_new_adapter: false to the configuration like the previous comment's blog post mentions

entry.title: Is there any exact SAP note.? for some users facing OBN issue in Both EDGE and CHROME browers!
Was SAP UI Test Automation just killed by SAP API Hub and Solace?
entry.content:
Summary

In this blog I will try to explain a thesis on why SAP UI Test Automation is obsolete for most of SAP S/4HANA transformations and how did the Solace (Even Mesh) and SAP Business Accelerator Hub (api.sap.com) might have killed it.

Chapter 1 - The problem with SAP UI testing

There are a few problems with SAP UI Test Automation but let's start with listing most typical SAP UI technologies used by SAP customers to access SAP:

- SAP GUI (with all it's versions) the traditional SAP Graphical User Interface used to interact with SAP ERP systems

- SAP Business Client - A desktop client that provides a unified access point to SAP Fiori, SAP GUI, and Web Dynpro applications

- SAP Fiori - the most modern and widely adopted UI technology for SAP applications

- SAPUI5 - SAPUI5 is a JavaScript-based UI development toolkit from SAP used for building responsive and feature-rich web applications

- Web Dynpro (yes still there) - A technology for developing web-based applications in SAP.

- SAP Mobile Technologies - to access SAP via mobile devices

- SAP CoPilot (future) - A digital assistant integrated into SAP applications, providing a conversational UI for interacting with SAP systems.


The big question is - which SAP UI technology you should use for test automation? The answer is simple, the one which is the most commonly used, right? What if most transactions are not being entered in a manual way (automated logistic systems) and most of the important ones (sales, purchasing, shipping) are coming via an interface (EDI - remember?).

If we are to summarise the biggest problems with SAP UI testing those would be:

a) difficulty to record a correct User Interface which keeps changing with each update of SAP business process, browser, etc.

b) very small number of people who can use the technology - only test automation teams (means it's never used by majority of real SAP Testers: functional teams, developers and business users)

c) creating SAP UI recordings is very complex - each transaction needs to be shown by a functional consultant and then the values can be used by the SAP Test Automation team


Chapter 2 - Changing the SAP landscapes - Solace (Even Mesh) and SAP Business Accelerator Hub (api.sap.com)

With more and more composable ERP solutions, SAP being on the forefront of this innovation, has moved two concepts to a new level:

a) with the introduction of SAP Business Accelerator Hub (api.sap.com) and other innovations around SAP Integration Suite - SAP S/4HANA can now connect to other applications on a completely different level via APIs and APIs have one significant advantage over SAP UI - they never change the interface. That means they are designed in way so if any change in the code happens the API will always work in the same way (unless a new version is released).

b) Solace partnership (Event Mesh and Advanced Event Mesh) - made another change, all of the business transactions can now easily output a message with it's content. That means getting the data from SAP transactions has become very simple and there's an abundance of that.

Having those two concepts (API Hub and Event-driven architecture - EDA) and corresponding technologies has just made it possible to skip doing SAP UI testing at all.

Chapter 3 - from SAP UI test automation to efficient SAP API test automation

Now that we can solve the 3 biggest issues with SAP UI Test Automation:

a) no need to record screens in different technologies and keep changing them if we can use SAP Business Accelerator Hub (api.sap.com) and test the most important piece - an integrated SAP business process

b) expand the number of people who can do SAP Testing - real SAP Testers: functional teams, developers and business users can also run SAP API tests (never the case with UI automated testing). 

c) no need to ask SAP functional consultants to create sample data if event data is available and consumable by anyone in large quantities + they can be immediately used for testing with SAP Business Accelerator Hub (api.sap.com)

Chapter 4 - How does it work now?

Imagine you have an Order to Cash (OTC) process where a sales order is entered using EDI and gets processed in a delivery and once the delivery is completed (by EDI) another steps would create an invoice. The old process would look like one from Figure 1. 

 

Figure 1 - old business process where UI test automation is used for manual steps in an Order to Cash process 

where most steps are done using API testing (EDI flows) but there are two (delivery and invoice creation) which needs to be done in a manual way using SAP UI testing solutions.

Now instead of that with the new way of working we can:

a) Find an API for the UI test on SAP Business Accelerator Hub (api.sap.com)

Figure 2 - SAP Business Accelerator Hub with all available APIs  

b) find as many samples of data from manual transactions using Even Mesh notifications as possible

Figure 3 - sample notification message from SAP S/4HANA (goods movement example)  

c) use the data from b) and populate the API test call and create a business process sequence
in your SAP API test automation solution

Figure 4 - API workflow test of a complete business process using API calls only (example from - Int4 Suite)  

Chapter 5 - What Does It Mean?

The move away from traditional SAP UI testing towards API and event-driven testing brings a host of positive changes to the SAP landscape as shown in Figure 5.

Figure 5 - moving away from SAP UI automated testing into complete business process testing using API automated testing only 

This shift doesn't just introduce new tools or methodologies; it transforms how we approach testing and system integration as a whole. Here are the four most important implications of this transition:

1. Streamlined and Accurate Testing Processes
With SAP API testing, the testing process becomes more streamlined and accurate. APIs offer a consistent interface for testing, which means we no longer need to worry about the constant changes in the UI. This stability allows us to focus on validating the core business processes and data integrity rather than being bogged down by the specifics of each UI technology. In essence, testing becomes more about ensuring that the business logic works as intended, rather than dealing with the quirks and changes of different user interfaces.

2. Wider Testing Participation Across Teams
One of the key benefits of shifting to API testing is that it opens up the testing process to a broader range of people within the organization. Unlike traditional UI testing, which often required specialized skills and tools, API testing can be conducted by functional teams, developers, and even business users. This democratization of testing means more comprehensive coverage, as those who understand the business processes best can now directly engage in testing activities. It eliminates the bottleneck of relying solely on test automation teams and allows for a more collaborative approach.

3. Faster and More Agile Deployment Cycles
By eliminating the need for complex and time-consuming UI testing, we can significantly accelerate the deployment cycle. APIs, by their nature, are less prone to frequent changes, making them easier and faster to test. This agility means that organizations can adapt to changes in their business environment more quickly, deploying updates and new features with confidence. In the fast-paced world of SAP S/4HANA transformations, this speed is a critical advantage, helping companies stay ahead of the competition.

4. Cost Savings and Resource Optimization
Moving away from UI testing can lead to considerable cost savings. Traditional SAP UI testing often requires expensive tools, skilled automation engineers, and significant time investment. By leveraging APIs and event-driven architectures, we can cut down on these costs. Testing at the API level requires fewer resources and can be executed by a broader group of people, making it more cost-effective. Furthermore, this shift allows organizations to allocate their resources more efficiently, focusing on enhancing their core business processes instead of maintaining complex UI test scripts.

In Conclusion

The decline of SAP UI testing, brought on by the rise of the SAP API portal and Solace's event-driven architecture, represents a fundamental shift in how we approach SAP testing. It's not merely about replacing one tool with another; it's about adopting a more efficient, inclusive, and agile way of ensuring system integrity. By focusing on API and event-driven testing, organizations can streamline their testing processes, involve more people in meaningful ways, accelerate their deployment cycles, and save costs. This evolution aligns testing more closely with business objectives, ensuring that what really matters—the core business processes—are thoroughly validated and optimized.

Further Reference: 

Avoid SAP S/4HANA Project Delays with Third-Party Systems Service Virtualization

entry.title: Re: Where is data stored maintained in SAP Build Apps (fr...
entry.content:
If you want to persist data and do need app specific backend, then you can e.g. use SAP Build Apps Backend a.k.a. Visual Cloud Functions.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/introduction-c2f99da6ff24490bbd0e705eb036ce84

entry.title: Re: AIF Interface monitoring in SolMan
entry.content: Thank you Vera_Jiang. Yes I have configured as same way but my concern is we have 100+ interfaces in the managed system, to monitor those I have to monitor those I have to input each interface in solman to monitor, if i give "*" instead of interface name to monitor all the interface together, it is not giving any value. Is there a way to monitor all interface without giving interface name individually

entry.title: Re: need SAC Free trail access but not Guided Experience
entry.content:
@praveen_kumar334 

Unfortunately The new SAC trial version is offering limited functionalities compared to its previous offerings. It does not allow you to download business content any more. So Unfortunately you would have to look towards your organization tenant or client tenant. At least its no longer possible on SAC trial version. 

Not sure why SAP did this but this is what it is now. In my opinion trial should offer full functionality for a limited period at least that's what other vendors offer. 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: for IT edocument, we have RE with debit and credit memo with same tax code, how to distingush?
entry.content:
hello experts:

thanks first

you know for MIRO it is RE document type, but we have normal MIRO, and credit memo also.

both are RE type, and tax code is also same. eg: tax code E4

so how to do this value mapping via     /AIF/VMAP   ---->   GET_DOC_TYPE_EXT

it should be different node, right? like REE4 (debit) --> TD01   and  REE4 (credit) ---> TD04

thanks again for your advice

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Automatic Email Notifications for St...
entry.content:
Dear Customer， 

The following link should be helpful to answer your questions:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/email-notification-for-status-change-in-charm/qaq-p/12547256

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: IW38 ,Display number of entries (Counter) in PM list...
entry.content:
Greetings,

are you perhaps using some old version of the system. According to the link:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/display-number-of-entries-and-counts-in-pm-list-edit-reports-iw28-iw38-ip15/ba-p/13323229

this functionality should be available from ECC6 EPH4 or higher. If you are using older version you might need to implement the notes manually.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: SHD0 - Transaction screen variant for work-center in operation

Thanks in advanced.

Regards,

Tejas

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:

We found a limitation on this upload job compare with "Import Job": Update Local Dimension Member option is not available.

I put the request on the Customer Influence. If you think this will benefit for you, please vote.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/331190

 

Thanks,

Renne

entry.title: Java methods to query current running method against WebIntelligence processing servers?

We'd like to be able to use this information to send alerts to support staff, rather than having someone have to continually monitor the tool once an issue has arisen. 

Does anyone have any scripts or pointers as to which Java calls we might be able to find information like the following:

entry.title: Re: UDF and FMS not working
entry.content:
Hi @SonTran ,

Thank you for this. Now Executed and good work. Can i ask one more? For the width inches. Please see below my query, please do on generator.

 

SELECT TOP 1 T0.[U_WIDINCH] FROM OBTN T0 INNER JOIN IGE1 T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[ItemCode] WHERE T1.[DocEntry] = $[IGE1.DocEntry] AND T1.[LineNum] = $[IGE1.LineNum] AND T0.[ItemCode] = $[IGE1.ItemCode] AND T0.[Quantity] > 0

---

I need to auto generated or auto populated the UDF once the user pick the item. I mean, this select an ItemCode in the Goods Issue document, the U_WIDINCH value from the corresponding batch in the OBTN table will automatically populate the designated UDF in the IGE1 table.

entry.title: Re: How to exclude 1 storage location during replenishmen...

Can you advise further?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAPIRE 7.0 and external REST Services + Binary Data
entry.content: Hi, id you get solution on how to set _binary flag in request?
